title: Accenture plc (ACN) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN ) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript June 22, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Katie O'Conor - Managing Director and Head, Investor Relations Julie Sweet - Chair and Chief Executive Officer KC McClure - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Lisa Ellis - MoffettNathanson Ashwin Shirvaikar - Citigroup Tien-Tsin Huang - JPMorgan Jason Kupferberg - Bank of America Bryan Keane - Deutsche Bank Rod Bourgeois - DeepDive Equity Research James Faucette - Morgan Stanley Operator Thank you for standing by. title: Why Accenture Stock Was Down on Thursday
text: Accenture posted strong Q3 results. Management pulled back the fiscal year growth outlook slightly.

title: Accenture (ACN) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Accenture (ACN) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.19 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.96 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.79 per share a year ago.

title: What These 2 Stocks Are Saying About an Economic Slowdown

title: Accenture shares set to fall as 4Q revenue estimates miss the mark
text: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has reported third-quarter revenue and earnings that beat estimates but guided for fourth-quarter revenue that was below expectations, sending its shares lower in pre-market trading.  The professional services firm posted a 3% rise in revenue to $16.6 billion for the quarter ended May 31, 2023, and adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $3.19, up 14% and ahead of the $3.04 expected by Wall Street analysts.

title: Accenture's Earnings and Revenue Beat Estimates. Why the Stock Is Falling.
text: Accenture expects fiscal 2023 revenue growth in the range of 8% to 9%, lower than previous projections.

title: Accenture stock falls after earnings beat expectations but revenue outlook was a bit downbeat
text: Shares of Accenture PLC ACN, -1.32% dropped 2.3% toward a fourth-straight loss after the management consultant reported fiscal third-quarter results that beat expectations but provided a somewhat downbeat revenue outlook. Net income for the quarter to May 31 rsoe to $2.01 billion, or $3.15 a share, from $1.79 billion, or $2.79 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Immersive Labs and Accenture Collaborate to Solve the Global Cyber Talent Shortage
